reading.title: Reading: A balanced argument
reading.passage: Some people support online learning because it saves time. Moreover, it is flexible. Nevertheless, many students argue that they learn better in person. In contrast, some people oppose any change at all. As a result, schools usually offer both options nowadays.

questions.question: All students prefer online learning.
questions.explanation: "many students argue that they learn better in person."

questions.question: What do schools usually do now?
questions.explanation: "As a result, schools usually offer both options nowadays."

reading.title: Reading: Technology in education and work
reading.passage: Technology has changed education a lot in recent years. A large number of students now use laptops in class. Many jobs will require digital skills in the future. A great deal of training is needed for this kind of job, and these skills will become even more valuable later.

questions.question: Many students now use laptops in class.
questions.explanation: "A large number of students now use laptops in class."

questions.question: What will many future jobs require?
questions.explanation: "Many jobs will require digital skills in the future."
